rationale: σ₀(n)=11 prime → multiplicativity forces n=p^10 (single shape only; p^4·q^2 has σ₀=15, p^2·q·r has σ₀=12). σ(p^10) ≡ 1 (mod p) ⇒ p∤σ(p^10) ⇒ n=p^10 cannot satisfy σ(n)=kn. 1-line p-adic. Slot737 σ₀ DNA precedent. Verified zero counterexamples for 167 odd primes ≤1000 and adjacent σ₀ ∈ {12,14,15} up to 10^7.
